Foam Machine Rental in Bathurst NB

Bathurst is a bilingual city on Chaleur Bay in northern New Brunswick, where Acadian and English heritages blend. Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. Bathurst NB is a bilingual city at the head of Chaleur Bay on New Brunswick's north coast, approximately 375 km from Bridgewater. We consider selected larger events in New Brunswick by availability and quote. Contact us with your event details and we will let you know whether your date and location work for our schedule. Travel and staffing quoted separately. Final availability confirmed manually.

Bathurst NB is approximately 375 km from our Bridgewater base. New Brunswick bookings are for selected larger events only. Travel costs, accommodation requirements if applicable, availability, and all logistics are confirmed by quote before any commitment.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you offer foam parties in Bathurst NB?
Bathurst NB is approximately 375 km from Bridgewater. Selected larger NB foam party events are considered by availability and quote.
Is the foam safe for children?
Yes. Our foam is a non-toxic, biodegradable, hypoallergenic formula designed for children's events. It is safe for skin and eyes and does not stain clothing.
What are the age restrictions for a foam party?
Foam parties are designed for children. We do not operate foam parties at adult events or events where alcohol is present.
What are the pricing tiers for a kids foam party?
Standalone foam party pricing: up to 30 kids $349/hr, 31–80 kids $599/hr, 80+ kids from $800/hr. As an add-on to another rental: up to 30 kids $200/hr, 31–80 kids $350/hr, 80+ from $650/hr. All pricing confirmed at time of booking.
Does the foam party need to be outdoors?
Foam parties are typically set up outdoors on grass or a flat surface. Indoor foam parties require explicit pre-approval and we evaluate the venue for drainage and surface suitability. Contact us with your venue details.
